name: Kitchen
description: Modern fully equipped kitchen with dishwasher, microwave, oven, and large fridge/freezer
instructions: Nespresso coffee machine - pods provided. Dishwasher tablets under sink. Induction cooktop - use magnetic cookware only.

name: Washer & Dryer
instructions: Laundry powder provided. Select wash cycle, then dry cycle runs automatically. Takes approximately 3 hours total.

name: Smart TV & Entertainment
description: 65" 4K Smart TV with Netflix, Stan, Disney+ and free-to-air
instructions: Remote on coffee table. Press 'Home' for apps. Login details for streaming services provided in welcome folder.

name: Air Conditioning
instructions: Wall panel in living area. Keep between 22-24°C for optimal comfort. Please turn off when leaving the apartment.

name: Balcony
description: Private balcony with outdoor furniture and ocean/city views
instructions: Please keep balcony doors closed when air conditioning is running. No smoking on balcony as per body corporate rules.

name: Secure Parking
description: One secure basement car space included
instructions: Space number will be provided on check-in. Remote control in apartment. Height clearance 2.1m.

name: Building Facilities
description: Access to pool, spa, sauna, gym and BBQ area
instructions: Facilities located on Level 4. Pool hours 6am-10pm. Gym 24/7 access with key card. BBQ bookings via building manager.
